Bash(cmd.exe /c "cd /d D:\\Programs\\Course_Manager\\course_manager\\backend && venv\\Scripts\\python -c ""from ortools.sat.python import cp_model; model = cp_model.CpModel\(\); x = model.NewBoolVar\(''x''\); model.Maximize\(x\); solver = cp_model.CpSolver\(\); status = solver.Solve\(model\); print\(''Status:'', status, ''x='', solver.Value\(x\)\)""")

- 自动分配4位教师并生成轮换表

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

- 校本课程：teacher为null的条目
- 普通课程：其余条目

Bash(cmd.exe /c "cd /d D:\\Programs\\Course_Manager\\course_manager && git add -A && git commit -m ""refactor: 授课分配页面改为表格矩阵样式
